message.content:
{
  "assessment_framework": {
    "marks_distribution": [
      "Class XI Theory: Max Marks 70, Time 3 Hours. Unit I (Diversity of Living Organisms): 15 marks; Unit II (Structural Organization in Plants and Animals): 10 marks; Unit III (Cell: Structure and Function): 15 marks; Unit IV (Plant Physiology): 12 marks; Unit V (Human Physiology): 18 marks.",
      "Class XI Practicals: Max Marks 30, Time 3 Hours. One Major Experiment: 5 marks; One Minor Experiment: 4 marks; Slide Preparation: 5 marks; Spotting Part B: 7 marks; Practical Record + Viva Voce: 4 marks; Project Record + Viva Voce: 5 marks.",
      "Class XII Theory: Max Marks 70, Time 3 Hours. Unit VI (Reproduction): 16 marks; Unit VII (Genetics and Evolution): 20 marks; Unit VIII (Biology and Human Welfare): 12 marks; Unit IX (Biotechnology and its Applications): 12 marks; Unit X (Ecology and Environment): 10 marks.",
      "Class XII Practicals: Max Marks 30, Time 3 Hours. One Major Experiment: 5 marks; One Minor Experiment: 4 marks; Slide Preparation: 5 marks; Spotting: 7 marks; Practical Record + Viva Voce: 4 marks; Investigatory Project and its Project Record + Viva Voce: 5 marks."
    ],
    "question_paper_design": [
      "Class XI Theory Typology: VSA (including MCQs), Assertion-Reasoning type questions, SA, LA-I, LA-II, Source-based/Case-based/Passage-based/Integrated assessment questions.",
      "Class XII Theory Competency Weightage: Demonstrate Knowledge and Understanding - 50%; Application of Knowledge / Concepts - 30%; Analyse, Evaluate and Create - 20%."
    ],
    "competency_weightage": [
      "Demonstrate Knowledge and Understanding: 50%",
      "Application of Knowledge/Concepts: 30%",
      "Analyse, Evaluate and Create: 20%"
    ],
    "bloom_levels": [
      "Knowledge and Understanding verbs: State, name, list, identify, define, suggest, describe, outline, summarize.",
      "Application of Knowledge/Concepts verbs: Calculate, illustrate, show, adapt, explain, distinguish.",
      "Analyze, Evaluate and Create verbs: Interpret, analyse, compare, contrast, examine, evaluate, discuss, construct."
    ],
    "internal_assessment": [
      "Internal choice of approximately 33% provided in theory question papers for both Class XI and XII.",
      "Topics included but assessed only formatively (Digestion and Absorption for Class XI; Environmental Issues for Class XII) to reduce academic stress."
    ],
    "practical_assessment": [
      "Class XI Practical Evaluation: Major Experiment, Minor Experiment, Slide Preparation, Spotting Part B, Record + Viva Voce.",
      "Class XII Practical Evaluation: Major Experiment, Minor Experiment, Slide Preparation, Spotting (Flowers adapted to pollination, Pollen germination, Gamete development stages, Meiosis, Blastula T.S., Mendelian inheritance, Pedigree charts, Controlled pollination, Disease causing organisms), Record + Viva Voce.",
      "Visually Impaired Students Practical: Time 2 Hours, Max Marks 30. Identification/Familiarity with apparatus (5 marks); Written test based on prescribed practicals (10 marks); Practical Records (5 marks); Viva (10 marks)."
    ],
    "project_assessment": [
      "Class XI Project Record + Viva Voce: 5 marks.",
      "Class XII Investigatory Project and its Project Record + Viva Voce: 5 marks."
    ]
  }
}
